cloud-cli.description: Infrastructure tooling not already installed by C8.

dev-web.description: Web development helpers layered on top of C6 Node/npm.

mobile-ios.description: Mobile development dependencies managed outside Xcode and Apple Business Manager.

data-cli.description: Local data tooling for approved developer workflows.

security-cli.assignment: Developers handling production, IaC, or container work
security-cli.description: Secret scanning, signing, SBOM, image scanning, and IaC linting tools.

dev-gui.assignment: Self-Service only; casks require explicit Mosyle opt-in
dev-gui.description: Optional GUI developer casks. Do not use for baseline or privileged/security apps.
